entities.baker: a baker in a white apron and chef hat
entities.girl: a girl in a blue jacket

scenes.title: The Town Square
scenes.background_prompt: A charming town square with cobblestone ground, a bakery shopfront with a striped awning, a clock tower showing 3 PM, and autumn leaves scattered on the ground. Warm afternoon light. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A charming town square on a warm autumn afternoon. A baker in a white apron and a tall white chef hat stands outside his bakery shop, holding a wooden tray piled with freshly baked golden-brown loaves of bread. Steam still rises faintly from the bread. The bakery behind him has a warm yellow facade with a brown-and-white striped awning and a chalkboard sign. A girl in a blue jacket and brown boots walks toward the baker from the right side of the scene, looking at the bread with interest. A clock tower rises in the background, its face clearly showing 3 PM. Fallen orange and red autumn leaves swirl gently on the cobblestone ground. A few other shops with colorful facades line the square, and warm golden light bathes the scene.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place baker outside his shop, standing and holding a wooden tray piled with freshly baked golden-brown loaves, faint steam rising. Place girl walking toward the baker from the right, looking at the bread with interest.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground on the left, a portion of a timber-framed house with yellow walls and a brown roof is visible, with small white flowers and green grass at its base. Standing on the sidewalk in front of a bakery is a baker, a man with brown hair and a friendly smile. He wears a tall white chef's hat, a light blue long-sleeved shirt, and a white apron with green trim and a green spoon tucked into a pocket. He also wears dark brown trousers and brown shoes. The baker holds a wooden tray containing three loaves of golden-brown bread with steam rising from them. To the right of the baker, scattered across the grey cobblestone street, are numerous orange and brown autumn leaves. On the right side of the foreground, a girl with brown hair in braids walks toward the left. She wears an orange beanie, a blue jacket, a red and white striped scarf, green and white striped leggings, and blue boots with red laces. She carries a brown backpack with a yellow flower patch on it and looks toward the baker. In the midground, behind the baker, is a small wooden bakery shop with a red and yellow striped awning over a blue door. A black chalkboard sign stands on the sidewalk to the right of the shop's entrance. Further back and to the right of the bakery is a tall, brown clock tower with a pointed grey roof; the clock face indicates the time is approximately 3:00. To the right of the clock tower are several more timber-framed houses with yellow or tan walls and red-tiled roofs. In the background, large trees with dense foliage in shades of orange, yellow, and green fill the spaces between and behind the buildings. The scene is set outdoors during a clear autumn afternoon under a light blue sky dotted with several soft, white clouds.

CH: a friendly baker in a white hat
a young girl with brown braids

the girl walks toward the bakery

the girl feels curious about the smell

the girl plans to walk home

the girl walks on the cobblestones
